nasb.text: Their bulbs and their branches were of one piece with it; the whole of it was a single hammered work of pure gold.

esv.text: Their calyxes and their branches were of one piece with it. The whole of it was a single piece of hammered work of pure gold.

cnv.text: 這些球和枝子都是連在一起的，全都是一塊純金錘成的。

ccb.text: 整座灯台，包括一切装饰，都是用一块纯金打成的。
